Built an **internal AI agent** for drill planning and restructured automation workflows, reducing planning cycle time by 39% and expanding drill capacity by 21% without adding headcount.

Built a **Power BI dashboard** tracking operational toil across 140+ teams, enabling leadership to identify automation gaps and prioritize high-impact interventions across enterprise operations.

Drove cross-functional alignment between IT, Operations, and Engineering to deploy **automated CI/CD pipelines**, accelerating software deployment cycles by 25% across production robotics systems.
Resolved 40+ high-priority tickets and stabilized developer intake by facilitating Agile ceremonies and **owning backlog prioritization** throughout the migration program.

Reduced **Customer Acquisition Cost by 13%** and lifted conversions 2.7% by executing a digital-first go-to-market strategy with website and Google profile optimization targeting enterprise accounts.
